description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the mgoral/super-ci-runner:latest Docker image with two stages: test and deploy, and a global before_script that runs pip3 install tox. In the test stage add a test job that runs tox -e py34, tox -e py35, and tox -e py36. Also add a test-coverage job (allow_failure true) that runs tox -e coverage and publishes coverage.xml and htmlcov/ as a coverage artifact named coverage that expires in 14 days. Add test-flake8 and test-pylint jobs that run tox -e flake8 and tox -e pylint respectively. In the deploy stage add a dist job that has its own before_script pip3 install -rreqs/requirements-deploy.txt, runs python3 setup.py sdist bdist_wheel and twine upload dist/* -u "$PYPI_USER" -p "$PYPI_PASS", only triggers on tags and pipeline triggers, and stores the built dist/ directory as an artifact named ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}-${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}.
